Our “why” is you — and has been since 1939.

“

Since America First Credit Union was founded in 1939, we’ve cared the most about your success, community, and family’s financial security. Because it’s not enough to simply be another credit union—we want to help you reach your financial goals and live the life you want.

                      What our members are asking

                      “

                      Managing your finances can feel overwhelming. Don’t worry, we’re here to help.

                      “

                      America First Credit Union’s routing number is 324377516. For more details on how to set up direct deposits, electronic deposits & withdrawals, payments, and wire transfers, click here.

                      “

                      You can easily complete an online application on our website, or you can apply in person at a branch or a dealership. Click here to get started.

                      “

                      Click here to find a map where you can find locations near you.

                      “

                      We offer easily online applications for certificates so you can start saving for the future. Click here to learn more.

                      “

                      You can complete a wire transfer request in online banking or at a branch. Click here for details.

                      “

                      We are always looking to hire the best people for a variety of positions. Click here to see current job openings.

                      The America First App — banking right in your pocket

                      Get an overview of your accounts and finances

                      Transfer money, pay bills, and manage all of your accounts in one place

                      Deposit checks from anywhere using your device’s camera

                      What our members are saying

                      “

                      America First serves hundreds of individuals and families just like you. Listen to what they have to say.

                      “

                      I had such a great experience with Lizett at America First Credit Union. She was super helpful, patient, and genuinely kind throughout the entire process. She took the time to explain everything clearly and made sure all my questions were answered without making me feel rushed.

                      It’s rare to come across someone who is not only knowledgeable but also truly cares about helping people, and Lizett definitely does. She made what could have been a stressful situation feel easy and smooth. America First is lucky to have her!

                      -Candace M

                      “

                      I spoke with Nakia and she was absolutely amazing!! Extremely helpful and kind! She was quick to assist and answered all of my questions to fullest. I was pleased with the wait time and how efficient the branch was. Really amazing bank overall!

                      -Savannah B

                      “

                      Hands down one of the smoothest processes and experiences I’ve had credit union. I had the pleasure of being assisted by Emma who made getting a business checking account smooth and non-intimidating. If you value customer service and clear communication, I recommend America First .

                      -Captain P

                      ©2026 America First Credit Union. All Rights Reserved. America First Federal Credit Union does business as (DBA) America First Credit Union.                       Federal Privacy Policy     |     Cookie Policy     |     Legal Disclosures and Documents

                      Aviso Importante
                      “

                      La siguiente página solo está disponible en inglés. Estamos trabajando para ofrecerte una experiencia completamente en español.

                      ¡Gracias por tu paciencia!

                          Privacy Preference Center

                          When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, usually in the form of cookies. This information may be about you, your preferences, or your device and is primarily used to ensure the site functions as you expect it to. This information does not typically directly identify individuals, but it can give users a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change the default settings. However, blocking some types of cookies will impact your experience of the site and the services we can offer.
                          Cookie Policy

                          Manage Consent Preferences

                          Strictly Necessary Cookies

                          Always Active

                          These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

                          Performance Cookies

                          These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

                          Functional Cookies

                          These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

                          Targeting Cookies

                          These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

                          Cookie List

                          Consent Leg.Interest
